name: What results should I expect after optimizing Siri?
description: Expect fewer failed commands, better suggestions, and more reliable reminders, messages, and calendar actions.

mainEntity.name: What results should I expect after optimizing Siri?

acceptedAnswer.text: Better Siri optimization usually means fewer failed commands, faster responses, and more accurate app actions. You should also see better suggestions, stronger voice recognition, and more reliable results for reminders, messages, calendar items, and searches. Complex multi-step tasks improve most when you use Shortcuts.
acceptedAnswer.description: Expect fewer failed commands, better suggestions, and more reliable reminders, messages, and calendar actions.
